# The Gateway Index

> The living index of LLM gateways, proxies & routers — the infrastructure that sits
> between apps and LLM providers — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-07-24T11:52:13.699774+00:00
Tools indexed: 185

## Top LLM gateways, proxies & routers by momentum

- [BerriAI/litellm](https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm) — momentum 87, ⭐54579 — Gateways & Proxies — The fastest, litest AI Gateway. Rust core with Python SDK. Call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native)
